mapper.sql: v.id, v.name, v.stock_no, m.name AS maker, v.model_year, v.mileage, v.price, s.code AS status, st.name AS store, v.fuel, v.color, v.transmission, v.inspection
FROM vehicles v INNER JOIN makers m ON v.maker_id = m.id INNER JOIN stores st ON v.store_id = st.id INNER JOIN vehicle_statuses s ON v.status_code = s.code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicles ( name, stock_no, maker_id, store_id, status_code, model_year, mileage, price, fuel, color, transmission, inspection ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{stockNo}, (SELECT id FROM makers WHERE name = #{maker}), (SELECT id FROM stores WHERE name = #{store}), #{status}, #{year}, #{mileage}, #{price}, #{fuel}, #{color}, #{transmission}, #{inspection} )
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET name = #{name}, stock_no = #{stockNo}, maker_id = (SELECT id FROM makers WHERE name = #{maker}), store_id = (SELECT id FROM stores WHERE name = #{store}), status_code = #{status}, model_year = #{year}, mileage = #{mileage}, price = #{price}, fuel = #{fuel}, color = #{color}, transmission = #{transmission}, inspection = #{inspection} WHERE id = #{id}
